title: linaria aequitriloba subsp. fragilis
intro: Linaria aequitriloba subsp. fragilis, also known as the fragile or delicate toadflax, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the toadflax genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linaria aequitriloba subsp. fragilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
